breadcrumb: (A SINGLE INSTRUMENT > 1 ALL DIMENSIONS ARE IN M.M. UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED. > Clause 3 6 mm DIA WEEP HOLE SHALL BE PROVIDED AT LOW POINT.
text: 3. 6 mm DIA WEEP HOLE SHALL BE PROVIDED AT LOW POINT.

breadcrumb: (A SINGLE INSTRUMENT > 4 U-BOLT ASSEMBLY SHALL BE OF MINIMUM M12 SIZE WITH NUTS AND SPRING WASHERS.
text: 4 U-BOLT ASSEMBLY SHALL BE OF MINIMUM M12 SIZE WITH NUTS AND SPRING WASHERS.

breadcrumb: (A SINGLE INSTRUMENT > 4 U-BOLT ASSEMBLY SHALL BE OF MINIMUM M12 SIZE WITH NUTS AND SPRING WASHERS. > Clause 5 ALL WELD SHALL BE 3mm FILLET WELD FULL STRENGTH.
text: 5. ALL WELD SHALL BE 3mm FILLET WELD FULL STRENGTH.

breadcrumb: (A SINGLE INSTRUMENT > 4 U-BOLT ASSEMBLY SHALL BE OF MINIMUM M12 SIZE WITH NUTS AND SPRING WASHERS. > Clause 6 ADD 50mm WHERE-EVER FIRE INSULATION IS PROVIDED.
text:
6. ADD 50mm WHERE-EVER FIRE INSULATION IS PROVIDED.
7. BOLT SHALL BE TURNED FROM M.S. ROUNDS CONFIRMING TO IS : 432 GRADE 1.
8. NUTS AND WASHERS SHALL CONFIRM TO IS : 1363 AND IS : 3138.
